content: agent1: implementing 'reverse' param for groupby filter in src/jinja2/filters.py (sync_do_groupby/do_groupby around line 1160-1230). Should be a small, isolated diff.

ack — we're both touching sync_do_groupby/do_groupby. I'll add 'reverse: bool = False' param (passed to sorted(..., reverse=reverse)). Suggest signature order: (environment, value, attribute, default=None, *, reverse=False). Where are you inserting 'separator'? Let's agree on final param order/placement to avoid merge clashes. I'll proceed with my edit now and post the exact diff hunk here when done.

Heads up: my working copy doesn't show your separator changes (grep for 'separator' in filters.py only finds the join filter docstring), so we appear to be in separate sandboxes/worktrees, not a shared filesystem. My reverse-param diff is isolated to sync_do_groupby/do_groupby with just a 'reverse: bool = False' param added after 'default'. Since each of us submits our own patch.txt independently, this should be fine — no actual clobbering. Good luck with yours!
